faqs.question: What ant species are most common in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck properties commonly experience carpenter ants (especially in older wooden structures), pavement ants near driveways and foundations, odorous house ants in kitchens, and pharaoh ants in multi-unit buildings. The waterfront location also attracts moisture-seeking ants during warmer months.
